output.code:
text = open('/mnt/data/file-Jy878gFYvBsuDk6UhR88RM-text_to_analyse.txt','r',encoding='utf-8').read()
# find all quoted segments
import re
spans=[]
for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]+)"', text):
    inner = m.group(1)
    # classify
    if inner.strip().startswith('يَمْحُو') or inner.strip().startswith('وَأَنْفِقُوا') or 'اللَّهُ' in inner:
        t='Aya'
    else:
        t='Hadith'
    spans.append((m.start(1), m.end(1), inner, t))
len(spans)

for s in spans:
    print(s[:3], s[2][:40], s[3])
